text.content: Rolling resistance represents the energy loss that occurs when an agricultural tire moves across a surface, directly impacting fuel efficiency and operational costs. This fundamental force opposes forward motion and manifests through three critical forces that tractor tires must overcome during field operations and road transport. Understanding these principles helps farmers optimize their ag tires for maximum fuel savings and extended tire life.
